title: BlockCarts
description: Allow any block to be put in a minecart
body:
# BlockCarts
## Overview
BlockCarts is a mod allowing you to put any block in a minecart, anywhere from a grass block to a bedrock block.
## Features
- A special "Minecart with [Block]" item, dropped from blockcarts when you shift + leftclick one.
- When a cart gets destroyed, be it from a cactus or a punch, it shoots out the block it had as a falling block and then drops as an empty minecart.
- You can shift right click a normal minecart to put a block in it.
- Dispensers can dispense blocks into minecarts.
